what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-asset image: a YAML-frontmatter markdown entry describing an icon named Square_Meters stored in the design-assets channel.
observations: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Records an image asset at path icons/Square_Meters
Contains a single version (v1) with identical blob and zero dimensions
Alt text for the version is empty
Source is dragnet; author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image/png asset
Alt text is empty in the version metadata
Single-version record with no outgoing links
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a markdown file as a structured ledger record
Follows a channel-memory schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, versions, and provenance fields
References binary content by blob URI rather than embedding it
concerns: Zero width and height may indicate incomplete metadata extraction or a missing/invalid image
Empty alt text reduces accessibility and searchability
No links or usage context are provided, limiting discoverability
notes: A catalog stub for a square-meters icon PNG in the design-assets channel, with a blob pointer but incomplete image dimensions and no alt text.
questions: Is the alt text intentionally empty or simply not populated?
What does the Square_Meters icon depict and where is it intended to be used?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose appears to be cataloging a square-meters icon asset; actual content is a valid ledger record, but the asset metadata (dimensions, alt text) is incomplete.
intention_signals: The file seems intended to create a stable, versioned, addressable ledger entry for a square-meters icon so it can be referenced by other parts of the system.
contribution: A versioned, addressable ledger record for a design asset with a blob pointer and provenance metadata, which a fused system could keep as a canonical asset reference once dimensions and alt text are completed.
summary_for_embedding: A versioned ledger entry for a PNG icon named Square_Meters in the design-assets channel, referencing a blob and recording zero dimensions and empty alt text.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide a stable address for a square-meters icon asset within the design-assets channel.
